case_title: GEORGE CENINA VS. OCWEN LOAN SERVICING, LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CENINA, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT OCWEN LOAN SERVICING, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST MARKED: "FAXED") FILED BY DEFENDANT OCWEN LOAN SERVICING, LLC
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-26-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00) SERVED DEC-08-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OCWEN LOAN SERVICING, LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT OCWEN LOAN SERVICING, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. RASHAD BLANCHARD APPEARSS ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CENINA, GEORGE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OCWEN LOAN SERVICING, LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
